verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present and named.
verify.rule: Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems, including connection_type, DOF, and clearance_mm.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking or preload evidence.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
verify must include a boundary_conditions object

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to insufficient datum references.
risk.mit: Add primary datum features such as flat, bore, or pin.

risk.desc: Risk of strain damage to cables due to unsupported exits and sharp edges.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry and ensure routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Insufficient accessibility for connectors and harnesses may cause installation issues.
risk.mit: Ensure connectors are reachable without disassembling structure and have clearance.

risk.desc: Potential for overclaiming in risk/verification documentation.
risk.mit: Focus risk/verification on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and avoid overclaiming.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly sequence leading to misalignment or damage.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Blueprint must include all required fields and follow the specified schema.

verify.value: Estimated mass of 1500g is within the expected range for a display model of this size.
verify.rule: Blueprint must include a mass estimate that is physically plausible for the subsystem scale.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in the geometry_ops with specific operations.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must have corresponding geometry_ops that reference it by id or target name.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connections with neighboring subsystems, including exact neighboring labels and joint family details.
verify.rule: Each interface must have a reciprocal connection with the neighboring subsystem, including connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking evidence and preload intent with specified torque values.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking or preload evidence, and torque_Nm or preload intent must be specified.

verify.value: Fixture points, thermal zones, and pressure faces are correctly defined for downstream CFD/FEA.
verify.rule: Boundary_conditions object must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces with coordinate-referenced values.

verify.value: Geometry_ops args.at coordinates are physically distributed across the local subsystem volume.
verify.rule: Geometry_ops args.at [x,y,z] must be distributed across the subsystem volume, with no two children's ops sharing identical coordinates.

verify.value: Each child has at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops including 1 body/shape op, 1 subtract/negative op, 1 interface/mounting op, and 1 finish op.
verify.rule: Each child's ops must include a body/shape op, a subtract/negative op, an interface/mounting op, and a finish op.

verify.value: Part_tree children and geometry_ops are mutually traceable by id/name with each child appearing at least 4 times in geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Every child id that appears in part_tree must appear as a target in geometry_ops at least 4 times.

verify.value: cad_brief includes an ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.
verify.rule: cad_brief must include an ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Each adjacent_interface includes stack_up_mm and fit_class.
verify.rule: For each adjacent_interface, include stack_up_mm and fit_class.

verify.value: All dimensions are physically plausible for the subsystem scale and match the stated material and process.
verify.rule: All dimensions must be physically plausible for the subsystem scale and match the stated material and process.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to human error.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training for assembly personnel.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to the display model during handling.
risk.mit: Use protective packaging and handling procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to lack of keying or labeling on connectors.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are labeled and keyed to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Risk of strain on cables due to unsupported exits.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry at every cable exit.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly sequence errors due to ambiguous build instructions.
risk.mit: Clarify assembly_sequence with step-by-step instructions and diagrams.

verify.value: All required fields are present in the design brief.
verify.rule: Check if all required fields in the design brief are present and correctly filled.
Ensure the mass budget is within the expected range for the subsystem.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: Verify that all P0 internal_feature_targets are referenced in the geometry.

verify.value: Adjacent interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm, and name exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Ensure interfaces are reciprocal and include fit_class and stack_up_mm.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Check that critical joints have visible evidence of locking or preload.

risk.desc: Risk of manufacturing process limitations impacting wall assumptions.
risk.mit: Conduct detailed dimensional inspection of wall thickness and build direction.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly order feasibility issues due to complex fastener patterns.
risk.mit: Review and validate the assembly sequence to ensure all fasteners are accessible.

risk.desc: Risk of inspection window visibility issues due to surrounding structures.
risk.mit: Ensure inspection windows are placed in clear, unobstructed areas.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to tolerance stack-up.
risk.mit: Implement strict tolerance control and verify stack-up at key interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of overclaiming structural integrity not aligned with actual design loads.
risk.mit: Review structural assumptions and verify against actual design loads.
